hero.title: The Dynamic
hero.subtitle: Deploy secure, compliant, and highly-scalable form automation across your entire global organization in minutes.

features.label: Core Capabilities
features.title: Powerful, Yet Simple
features.subtitle: AI FormFlow provides the tools you need to build secure, dynamic forms that integrate perfectly with your business processes.
features.drag_desc: Build complex, high-conversion forms in minutes with our intuitive visual builder. No coding knowledge required.
features.logic_desc: Create dynamic fields that respond to user input in real-time. Build smarter workflows with conditional visibility.
features.integration_desc: Automatically sync your data with Salesforce, Slack, AWS, and more. Connect your entire stack with one click.

integrations.label: Integrations
integrations.title: Your Stack, Connected
integrations.subtitle: Automatically sync data to your favorite enterprise tools. No coding required, just seamless connectivity.

cta.title: Ready to secure your workflows?
cta.subtitle: Join over 2,500 enterprise companies automating their data collection with AI FormFlow today.

footer.description: Enterprise-grade form automation for the modern web. Compliant, secure, and blazing fast.

premiumfeatures.title: Premium Features
premiumfeatures.subtitle: Powerful tools included in our Professional and Enterprise plans.
premiumfeatures.ai_powered_desc: Automatically optimize questions based on user behavior to maximize completion rates.
premiumfeatures.payment_desc: Collect one-time or recurring payments directly within your forms with Stripe and PayPal.
premiumfeatures.voice_form_desc: Engage users with voice-first experiences and allow voice responses for better accessibility.

packs.title: Scalable plans for every stage
packs.subtitle: From early-stage startups to global enterprises, FormFlow AI provides the tools to build intelligent, conversation-driven forms.

questions.title: Frequently Asked Questions
questions.subscription_title: Can i cancel my subscription at any time?
questions.subscription_desc: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You will continue to have access to your paid features until the end of yourbilling cycle.
questions.submission_title: What happens if I exceed my submission limit ?
questions.submission_desc: We'll notify you when you reach 90% of your limit. If you exceed it, your forms will remain active, but you'll be charged a small overage fee per additional submission or you can upgrade to the next tier.
questions.discount_title: Do you offer discounts for non-profits?
questions.discount_desc: Yes! We offer a 30% discount for registered non-profits and educational institutions. Contact our sales team to apply.
